use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING CYSTINURIA BY ORALLY ADMINISTERING TIOPRONIN WITH FOOD TO PREVENT CYSTINE STONE FORMATION IN ADULTS AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS WITH SEVERE HOMOZYGOUS CYSTINURIA

indications.text:
THIOLA EC is indicated, in combination with high fluid intake, alkali, and diet modification, for the
prevention of cystine stone formation in adults and pediatric patients 20 kg and greater with severe
homozygous cystinuria, who are not responsive to these measures alone.
